# gaming corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === Gaming / Steam ===
# expect: Steam Web API Key
# expect: Steam Trade URL Token
webapi_key=B2F7A0873A0C4B5EBB2E3A0C4B5EBB2E
https://steamcommunity.com/tradeoffer/new/?partner=46143802&token=KYworVTM

# === Gaming / PlayFab ===
# expect: PlayFab Developer Secret Key
X-SecretKey: RTKBNXKOH9NGPC5S0AT0K9B1ZPDWIWKK67G54VYN6RKLB

# === Gaming / Twitch ===
# expect: Twitch Client ID
# expect: Twitch Client Secret
# expect: Twitch OAuth Token
twitch_client_id=wbmytr93xzw8zbg0p1izqyzzc5mbiz
twitch_client_secret=nyo51xcdrerl8z9m56w9w6wg012345
oauth:rfx2uswqe8l4g1mkagrvg5tv0ks3ab

# === Gaming / Roblox and Riot ===
# expect: Roblox .ROBLOSECURITY Cookie
# expect: Riot Games API Key
_|WARNING:-DO-NOT-SHARE-THIS.ABC|_AAB1F6B0123456789ABCDEF0123456789ABCDEF0123456789ABCDEF0123456789ABCDEF0123456789ABCDEF0123456789ABCDEF
RGAPI-01234567-89ab-cdef-0123-456789abcdef

# === Gaming / Epic ===
# expect: Epic Online Services Client ID
xyza7891AbCDe23fgHIJkL45MnopQR67stuVWX89
